landing.title: Welcome to DocAI
landing.subtitle: RAG chat over your PDFs — with citations, cost tracking, and evals you can actually see.
landing.footer: A portfolio project by Josue Cortes.
landing.signInToUpload: Sign in to upload a PDF.
landing.help: DocAI lets you upload a PDF and then chat with it. Upload a document below; once it's ingested you can ask questions and get answers grounded in its text, with citations back to the page.
landing.disclaimer: You're responsible for having the rights to the content you upload. Portfolio demo.

banner.message: Demo in progress — some features are still being built.

chat.title: Chat
chat.hint: Ask about your ingested PDFs — answers are grounded in your documents, with citations.
chat.empty: Ask a question to get started.
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.privacyNote: Your chat history is saved only in this browser, never on our servers.
chat.pdfHighlightNote: The cited passage is highlighted above. Opening the PDF jumps to the page; in-PDF highlight there is supported in Chrome, Edge and other Chromium browsers.
chat.help: Ask natural-language questions about your ingested PDFs. Answers come only from the retrieved passages and include citation chips — click one to see the exact source text and open the PDF at that page.

search.title: Search
search.hint: Search your ingested PDFs. No chat — just retrieval, with the score behind every result.
search.help: Search your PDFs without the LLM — this shows the raw retrieval: the top passages with their cosine, BM25, RRF and reranker scores, so you can see how relevant each match is.

upload.cta: Drop a PDF here or click to upload

ingest.title: Ingest status
ingest.failedTimeout: This upload timed out before it finished processing. Try uploading it again.
ingest.readyHint: Your document is ingested. Ask questions about it and get answers with citations.

usage.title: Usage
usage.hint: Cost, calls, and latency for your activity.
usage.hintOwner: Project-wide cost, calls, and latency across all workspaces.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hint: Bring your own Anthropic key to chat without the free-tier limits.
settings.byokHint: With your own key, chat runs on Claude and skips the daily quota, weekly trial lock, and project budget — your key pays for the calls.
settings.invalid: That doesn't look like an Anthropic key (it should start with "sk-ant-").
settings.securityNote: Stored only in this browser tab (sessionStorage), sent with each request, and cleared when you close the tab. We never save or log it.

account.title: Account
account.hint: Your usage, API key, and uploaded files.
account.hintOwner: Project-wide usage, your API key, and your uploaded files.
account.help: Review your usage (cost, calls, latency) and add your own Anthropic API key to skip the free-tier limits. Manage your uploaded files from the home page.

files.title: Your files
files.hint: PDFs you've uploaded. Deleting removes the file and everything indexed from it.
files.empty: You haven't uploaded any PDFs yet.
files.deleteError: Couldn't delete that file. Please try again.

terms.title: Terms & data
terms.intro: DocAI is a portfolio demo, not a production service. By using it you agree to the points below.
terms.contentBody: You are responsible for having the rights to any PDF you upload. Don't upload confidential, personal, or copyrighted material you aren't allowed to share.
terms.dataBody: Your chat history is stored only in your browser (localStorage), never on our servers. Uploaded PDFs are stored to enable retrieval and are deleted after a retention window that depends on your plan, or as soon as you delete them.
terms.warrantyBody: Answers are AI-generated from your documents and may be inaccurate or incomplete. The demo is provided as-is, without warranties, and may change or go offline at any time.
terms.contactBody: Questions about the demo? Get in touch.

out_of_credit.title: Out of credit
out_of_credit.body: The demo's API budget is exhausted for now. Add your own Anthropic key to keep chatting.

daily_limit.title: Daily limit reached
daily_limit.body: You've used your free messages for today. They reset at 00:00 UTC.

project_over_capacity.title: Demo at capacity
project_over_capacity.body: The demo hit its budget cap for now. Add your own key to continue, or come back tomorrow.

weekly_lock.title: Free trial ended
weekly_lock.body: Your 7-day free trial is over. Add your own Anthropic key to keep going, or get in touch.

invalid_byok.title: Invalid API key
invalid_byok.body: Anthropic rejected that key. Review it in settings and try again.

model_overload.title: Model busy
model_overload.body: The model is overloaded right now. Give it a moment and try again.

file_too_large.title: File too large
file_too_large.body: That PDF exceeds the size or page limit for your plan. Try a smaller file.

pdf_unparseable.title: Couldn't read the PDF
pdf_unparseable.body: This file looks scanned or image-only — there's no extractable text to work with.

network_error.title: Connection problem
network_error.body: The request didn't go through. Check your connection and try again.

storage_full.title: Storage full
storage_full.body: The demo's storage is full right now. Delete old files to free up space.
